finalized_plan.description: Use the visualizer tool to inspect the 2008 painting "Embroidery from Uzbekistan" image and extract the list of fruits shown, noting their positions arranged in a circular layout starting from the 12 o’clock position in clockwise order

Search for historical records that document the October 1949 breakfast menu for the ocean liner (later used as a floating prop in the film "The Last Voyage") to retrieve the list of fruits served on that menu
Compare the fruit list from the painting with the breakfast menu fruit list to identify the overlapping fruit items
Arrange the overlapping fruits according to their clockwise order as determined from the painting, starting from the 12 o’clock position
Convert each fruit name to its plural form and format the final answer as a comma-separated list

root_cause_reasoning: The agent fabricate the answer without inspecting the painting
